caribbean.headline: San Juan Faces High Waves and Heavy Rain Today
caribbean.paragraph: San Juan is experiencing moderate winds up to 14 knots with significant wave heights reaching 8.3 feet and a dominant north swell period of 10 seconds. Rain probability is high at 90 percent, indicating a wet day with rough sea conditions, while Turks and Caicos see stronger winds near 22 knots but lower wave impacts.

mediterranean.headline: Strong Winds and High Waves Impact Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing sustained winds of 21 knots with wave heights reaching 8 feet and a dominant swell from the WSW at a 10-second period. Rain probability is very high at 98 percent, creating challenging conditions for maritime operations and port activities in the Eastern Mediterranean.
